Delayed report from August 5. This EF0 tornado damaged trees, crops, and one outbuilding. It was embedded within a downburst that resulted in a complex damage path. The tornado was quickly overcome by these downburst winds, which continued to produce tree damage for another half mile after the tornado circulation dissipated. Tornado lasted for 3 minutes.
